settings.title: Your Kevin purchase includes
settings.body: Kevin® device with your chosen front cover color · Kevin App control · 70+ hours of built-in simulations · Weekly schedules and geo-fencing · Upload your own household sounds · AI-generated household audio · Bluetooth speaker and lamp at home · Flexible placement with approx. 3 m power cable · Free delivery across Europe · 3-year Swiss warranty · Lifetime software updates · 30-day returns

settings.heading: Pricing FAQ
settings.body: Common questions about buying Kevin on mitipi.eu.

settings.question: Is Kevin a subscription?
settings.answer: On mitipi.eu you buy Kevin outright with a one-time payment. Lifetime software updates are included. There are no mandatory monthly monitoring fees.

settings.question: What does free delivery cover?
settings.answer: Free delivery across Europe on qualifying orders through mitipi.eu. Taxes are calculated at checkout based on your country.

settings.question: What if Kevin stops working?
settings.answer: Kevin includes a 3-year Swiss warranty. Contact support with your serial number (on the bottom of the device) and order reference for repair or replacement guidance.

settings.question: Can I return Kevin?
settings.answer: Yes—30-day returns apply as stated at checkout. Configure your color, try Kevin at home, and contact support if you need help with a return.

settings.title: Transparent checkout
settings.body: Configure your color on the secure Shopify checkout flow at mitipi.eu. Taxes calculated at checkout. Kevin is prevention-first protection you own outright—no surveillance subscriptions.
